OPTION_INITIAL_POINT.name: Ascend
OPTION_INITIAL_POINT.description_stage1: Spend [gold]60[/gold] Gold to [gold]Ascend[/gold]. Gain [blue]1[/blue] random token relic (excluding special relics) and heal [blue]15[/blue]% Max HP.
OPTION_INITIAL_POINT.description_stage2: Spend [gold]90[/gold] Gold to [gold]Ascend[/gold]. Gain [blue]1[/blue] random token relic (excluding special relics) and heal [blue]15[/blue]% Max HP.
OPTION_INITIAL_POINT.description_stage3: Spend [gold]120[/gold] Gold to [gold]Ascend[/gold]. Gain [blue]1[/blue] random token relic (excluding special relics) and heal [blue]15[/blue]% Max HP.
OPTION_INITIAL_POINT.description_maxed: All [blue]3[/blue] ascensions are complete. This option now only heals [blue]15[/blue]% Max HP.
